name: Official BTT route of Ossona 9 - circular
name_original: Ruta BTT official de Ossona 9 - circular
region_intro: Mountain biking around Manlleu offers diverse landscapes, from riverside paths along the Ter River to ascents towards local sanctuaries and hills. The region is characterized by varied terrain, including open plains, forested areas, and the influence of the nearby Montseny Natural Park. An established network of trails connects Manlleu with other MTB centers in Osona, providing extensive options for riders. This area features a mix of natural features and well-maintained routes suitable for mountain biking. Best mountain bike trails around Manlleu The most popular mountain bike trail is Official BTT route of Ossona 9 - circular, a 9.2 miles (14.8 km) trail that takes 1 hour 10 minutes to complete. This route is part of the recognized Osona region network. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Ter Promenade, Manlleu – Santuario de Puig-agut loop from Manlleu, a difficult 32.1 miles (51.6 km) path. This route combines riverside sections with climbs to the Santuario de Puig-agut, offering panoramic views. Local mountain bikers also love the Sant Esteve de Vila-Setrú – Bellmunt Sanctuary loop from Manlleu, a 23.8 miles (38.3 km) trail leading through varied countryside towards the Bellmunt Sanctuary, often completed in about 3 hours 2 minutes. Mountain biking around Manlleu is defined by the Ter River, local sanctuaries, and the diverse terrain influenced by the Montseny area. The network offers options for easy, moderate, and difficult routes, catering to different ability levels. The routes in Manlleu are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.4 stars from more than 70 reviews. More than 700 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Manlleu's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available around Manlleu?
A: There are over 55 mountain bike trails around Manlleu, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels. The area is part of the larger Vic Plain MTB Centre, which provides an extensive network of routes.

Q: What types of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Manlleu?
A: Mountain biking around Manlleu features diverse terrain, from relatively flat riverside paths along the Ter River to ascents towards local sanctuaries and hills. You'll encounter open plains, forested areas, and varied landscapes influenced by the nearby Montseny Natural Park.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Manlleu?
A: Yes, Manlleu offers several easy mountain bike trails. There are 8 routes specifically categorized as easy, providing a gentle introduction to the region's cycling. These are often found along the Ter River, offering pleasant rides.

Q: Can I find challenging mountain bike routes for experienced riders?
A: Absolutely. For experienced riders seeking a challenge, there are 19 difficult mountain bike routes around Manlleu. Trails like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/14958001" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ter Promenade, Manlleu – Santuario de Puig-agut loop from Manlleu&lt;/a&gt; offer significant elevation gain and longer distances, combining riverside sections with climbs to panoramic viewpoints.

Q: What are some notable landmarks or natural features to see along the mountain bike trails?
A: Many trails offer stunning views and pass by significant landmarks. You can cycle towards the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/380370" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Foradada Waterfall and Mill&lt;/a&gt;, or enjoy panoramic vistas from sanctuaries like Santuario de Puig-agut or Bellmunt Sanctuary. The Ter River is a constant feature, and the Sau Reservoir, with its submerged church bell tower, is also a striking sight in the wider region.

Q: Are there mountain bike routes that offer great viewpoints?
A: Yes, many routes in the Manlleu area lead to impressive viewpoints. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10471456" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sant Esteve de Vila-Setrú – Bellmunt Sanctuary loop from Manlleu&lt;/a&gt; takes you towards the Bellmunt Sanctuary, which offers expansive views of the Eastern Pyrenees and the plain of Vic. The Santuario de Puig-agut also provides excellent views.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes around Manlleu?
A: Yes, many mountain bike routes around Manlleu are circular, allowing you to start and end in the same location. A well-known example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e961524164/official-btt-route-of-ossona-9-circular" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Official BTT route of Ossona 9 - circular&lt;/a&gt;, which is part of the recognized Osona region network.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Manlleu?
A: The mountain bike trails around Manlleu are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.4 stars from over 70 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse landscapes, the well-maintained network, and the variety of routes suitable for different skill levels.

Q: Is it possible to find long-distance mountain biking options in the Manlleu area?
A: Yes, Manlleu is connected to an extensive network of trails, including the Vic Plain MTB Centre, which offers over 200 kilometers of signposted routes. This allows for longer excursions, connecting Manlleu with Vic and the Montseny area, and even other MTB centers in Osona.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Manlleu?
A: The region generally offers good conditions for mountain biking for much of the year. Spring and autumn typically provide pleasant temperatures and vibrant scenery. Summer can be warm, so early morning or late afternoon rides are often preferred, while winter can be cooler but still enjoyable on clear days.

Q: Are there any routes that follow the Ter River?
A: Yes, the Ter River is integral to Manlleu's landscape, and many mountain bike routes incorporate sections along its banks. These riverside paths often provide relatively flat and accessible riding, such as parts of the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/14958001" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ter Promenade, Manlleu – Santuario de Puig-agut loop from Manlleu&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Can I combine mountain biking with visiting waterfalls in the area?
A: Yes, you can. The region around Manlleu features several beautiful waterfalls. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/380370" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Foradada Waterfall and Mill&lt;/a&gt; is a notable natural feature that can be incorporated into longer cycling excursions, offering a refreshing stop.
tips: A crossroads with beautiful views. There are many good mountain bike trails that pass through this area.
The Puig-agut Sanctuary is a beautiful hermitage with a lot of history. The architecture and landscape are different from most of what you can see in Catalunya. Very interesting.
Small house-hermitage frequented for walks. Also popularly called "el Poquí"
